SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIERSON, MELINA N. $1,048.15 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,108.15, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
